needed_metric: Lithium processing/refining top-three concentration detail, country-share context, or source table/chart supporting the existing V2.4 lithium refining concentration snapshot.
expected_use: Check whether the V2.4 lithium processing/refining top-three value can be tied to a more explicit report table, chart, or downloadable source statement.
acceptance_criteria: Accept only if the source identifies year, geography, product definition, denominator, and country or producer share basis.
current_claim_allowed: May support bounded descriptive confidence in the existing lithium processing/refining concentration comparison if the metric is traceable.
current_claim_blocked: Do not use for investment signal, policy recommendation, geopolitical ranking, bottleneck proof, disruption probability, vulnerability ranking, or complete supply-chain risk conclusion.
notes: Current best first stop because V2.4 already cites IEA Global Critical Minerals Outlook 2025 for lithium.

needed_metric: Downloadable or inspectable lithium refining/processing concentration data by year, country, and stage.
expected_use: Test whether the IEA data tool contains structured data that can replace manually curated snapshot evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Accept only if data can be traced to material, year, stage, geography, denominator, and share basis.
current_claim_allowed: May support future structured enrichment if the data tool exposes comparable lithium processing/refining values.
current_claim_blocked: Do not infer values from charts without a clear data basis.
notes: Use only if the data can be accessed or exported with enough metadata.

needed_metric: General critical minerals refining concentration context.
expected_use: Use as contextual support for the broader pattern that refining/processing concentration remains high.
acceptance_criteria: Do not convert into lithium-specific numeric concentration unless a lithium-specific table or statement is present.
current_claim_allowed: May support general framing that refining/processing concentration is an important evidence layer.
current_claim_blocked: Do not use as a substitute for lithium-specific source evidence.
notes: Useful for framing, not enough by itself for V2.6 lithium metric enrichment.

needed_metric: Prior-year lithium refining/processing concentration context or historical comparison evidence.
expected_use: Check whether a 2024 report table or chart gives historical lithium refining concentration context that helps validate the 2025 snapshot.
acceptance_criteria: Accept only if lithium-specific stage, year, geography, product definition, and concentration basis are clear.
current_claim_allowed: May support bounded historical context if values are traceable and comparable.
current_claim_blocked: Do not create a trend claim unless annual comparable values are available.
notes: Useful for checking whether V2.4 can later become an annual comparison rather than a one-year snapshot.

needed_metric: Lithium mine-production country-share baseline and documentation of mining denominator.
expected_use: Use to maintain the mining-side baseline when comparing mining top-three concentration with refining/processing concentration.
acceptance_criteria: Accept for mining baseline only; do not use as refining/processing evidence unless refining-specific data is present.
current_claim_allowed: May support the mining-side comparator in a bounded mining-versus-processing/refining comparison.
current_claim_blocked: Does not by itself support lithium refining concentration claims.
notes: Important to keep mining and refining denominators separate.
